title: DarkBosses
description: Shows boss summoning information and grants extra xp for defeating bosses
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

DarkBosses


View special boss information and get extra experience for defeating bosses | View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features)
 

DarkBosses was originally made for the DarkRPG Fabric modpack but works as a standalone mod as well. This mod shows an extra advancement section (press L and click on dragon head) that displays how to summon a boss and where to find them. In total this gives information for up to 15 bosses including vanilla bosses. Each boss defeat will grant you 500 XP and it also shows a special 'Boss Defeated' message similar to the Dark Souls games. 

You will need the following mods (and their dependencies) installed:-

- Bosses of Mass Destruction

- Soulslike Weapons

- Spellblades and Such (1.20+)

- The Graveyard (1.20+)

 

 

Permission - Feel free to use in your modpacks.

 

Click the banner below to get your server today! or go to BisectHosting.com  and make sure to use the code 'gamerpotion' to get your 25% off.
